name: Nemleria Dream Devourer - Reveil
name_jp: ネムレリアの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>夢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>喰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>く</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い－レヴェイユ
desc: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can banish 3 cards from your Extra Deck face-down, except "Dreaming Nemleria"; Special Summon this card. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this effect, except Pendulum Monsters. You can send 1 other Level 10 Beast monster from your hand or face-up field to the GY; Set 1 "Nemleria" Trap directly from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Nemleria Dream Devourer - Reveil" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can banish 3 cards from your Extra Deck face-down, except "Dreaming Nemleria"; Special Summon this card. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this effect, except Pendulum Monsters. You can send 1 other Level 10 Beast monster from your hand or face-up field to the GY; Set 1 "Nemleria" Trap directly from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Nemleria Dream Devourer - Reveil" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can banish 3 cards from your Extra Deck face-down, except "Dreaming Nemleria"; Special Summon this card. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this effect, except Pendulum Monsters. action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
banished: Banishes from Extra Deck for cost
